modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Confusion about the difference between gross and net income

full_description_text:  
I was on the phone with someone who was trying to understand what gross income and net income really mean. They seemed a bit lost and wanted to know how these two terms are different. It was clear they needed some help figuring this out.
short_description: Confusion about the difference between gross and net income
description: I was on the phone with someone who was trying to understand what gross income and net income really mean. They seemed a bit lost and wanted to know how these two terms are different. It was clear they needed some help figuring this out.
